targets.notes: Commitment made through The Climate Pledge to achieve net-zero carbon by 2040 via emissions reductions and compensating for residual emissions.
targets.title: Net-zero carbon emissions across Amazon’s businesses by 2040

targets.boundary: Electricity use across Amazon’s global operations
targets.notes: Target to match all electricity used in operations with renewable energy by 2025, primarily affecting Scope 2 emissions.
targets.title: 100% renewable energy for Amazon operations by 2025
targets.unit: % of electricity consumption from renewable sources
